runtime_services.name: sysdocs-dashboard

deployments.notes: The node API on 8701 is the local verification surface for this project. The optional dashboard on 8550 is started separately with `bash dashboard/start.sh`.

notes: Production environment for sys_docs on the .47 runtime host.

runtime_services.name: token-usage-dashboard
runtime_services.purpose: auxiliary Streamlit dashboard for token tracking

dependencies.name: milvus
dependencies.notes: vector store for retrieval over `documentdb` and `documentdb_v2`

dependencies.name: mysql
dependencies.notes: conversation, document metadata, analytics, and test persistence

dependencies.name: openai
dependencies.notes: LLM, query expansion, and generation support

cross_dependencies.name: aichat_test
cross_dependencies.notes: separate sibling test frontend that targets the live backend on 8506

cross_dependencies.name: aichat_ingestion
cross_dependencies.notes: separate sibling ingestion node rooted in `/home/pesu/aichat_test/project` that writes extracted assets and Milvus corpora used by aichat retrieval

deployments.notes: Main chat backend is on 8506. Auxiliary token dashboard is on 8505. The Switchboard node on 8702 is the local verification surface for this project.

notes: Production environment for aichat on the .47 runtime host.
